General.Name: ARS Pharmaceuticals, Inc
General.Description: ARS Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, develops and commercializes treatments for severe allergic reactions in the United States and internationally. The company is involved in the development of neffy, a needle-free intranasal delivery of epinephrine for emergency treatment of Type I allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis. ARS Pharmaceuticals, Inc. was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in San Diego, California.
General.Address: 11682 El Camino Real, San Diego, CA, United States, 92130
